tipRules.tip: Robertson: Throw a lipless bait in grass during the prespawn offshore pattern at Chickamauga-style fisheries to target fish still wanting to spawn.

knowledge.insight: Robertson: During prespawn at Chickamauga, fish an offshore pattern with a lipless crankbait in grass, then go headhunting with a big swimbait for kicker bites.
Robertson: On heavily-pressured lakes, wind is the great equalizer -- when the wind blows, the fish bite. Want it to blow hard.
Robertson: After a tough start to a season, commit to fishing your strengths rather than adjusting to what others are doing. Fish for five bites and don't care if you blank -- fish how you want.
Robertson: A cold snap during prespawn can work in your favor by slowing fish down and keeping them in their prespawn staging areas longer.
